title: Gift Card Acceptance
description: Where can I spend my CADO, UpCadhoc, and Illicado gift cards and vouchers (both online and in physical stores)?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive list of merchant locations and websites that accept these multi‑brand gift cards. Relevant documents should identify physical outlets (by city, postal code, or nearby area) and online shops, grouped by product categories such as fashion, beauty, culture, leisure, travel, food, and home. The answer should include map or location references when available, indicate whether the card can be used in‑store, online, or both, and mention any special conditions (e.g., card registration, conversion to e‑coupons). Only sources that explicitly state acceptance of the CADO, UpCadhoc, or Illicado cards are considered relevant.

title: Spice Adjustment
description: How can the traditional Moroccan lamb tajine recipe be altered to lower its spiciness without losing its characteristic flavor?
narrative: The user is looking for practical ways to reduce the heat of a classic Moroccan lamb tajine while keeping the dish authentic and tasty. Relevant passages should discuss the quantities of chilies or other hot spices used in the recipe, user comments that suggest cutting back on spice levels, alternative seasoning options, or tips for balancing flavor after lowering heat. Recipes, reviews, or cooking tips that address spice reduction, measurement conversions (e.g., teaspoons instead of soup spoons), or flavor‑preserving substitutions satisfy the information need.

title: Lotus Elise Deals
description: Where can I find used Lotus Elise cars for sale in France that have low mileage, are recent enough, and cost no more than €35,000?
narrative: The user is looking for current online advertisements of used Lotus Elise vehicles available in France. Relevant documents should mention Lotus Elise listings, include details such as mileage (preferably under 50,000 km), model year (roughly 2000‑2022), price (≤ €35,000), and any other salient attributes like manual transmission or black exterior. Documents that only discuss generic car‑sale platforms without specific Lotus Elise information, or those that list other makes/models, are not relevant.

title: Veal Paupiette Variations
description: What are the traditional and modern recipes for veal paupiettes, including ingredient choices, sauces, and cooking techniques?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive overview of veal paupiette preparations, covering classic French methods (e.g., mushroom, onion, broth sauces) as well as newer twists (e.g., pesto‑mozzarella, cream‑based sauces). Relevant information should include ingredient lists, step‑by‑step cooking instructions, timing tips, and any cultural or historical notes that help decide which version suits a dinner occasion. Documents describing recipes, variations, cooking tips, and background on the dish are all considered relevant.

title: Legal Tint Compliance
description: What are the French legal requirements for automotive solar window tint films and which product specifications satisfy those regulations?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed information on France's current law regarding visible light transmission (TLV) limits for car windows, especially the minimum 70% requirement for front side glazing and the lack of restrictions for rear windows. Relevant documents must explain these legal constraints, describe permissible film percentages, and list film products or kits that meet the compliance criteria.

title: Petit Bateau Store Locator
description: Where is the nearest Petit Bateau store that carries women's clothing?
narrative: The user wants to find the closest physical Petit Bateau shop that stocks the women's collection (e.g., dresses, sweaters, waterproof wax jackets). Relevant information includes store location listings, maps or directories, and confirmation that women's apparel is available at those locations.

title: Renault Personnel Sale
description: What are the options, terms, and discounts available for purchasing a new Renault through the Renault personnel (employee) sales program?
narrative: The user wants detailed information about the Renault personnel sale program, including eligibility criteria, discount percentages, financing and leasing options, insurance requirements, and how the program differs from standard dealer purchases. Relevant documents should describe the employee‑type pricing, the process for obtaining a vehicle at these rates, any contractual conditions (e.g., lease with purchase option, insurance coverage), and real‑world experiences or guarantees associated with the service.

title: War School e‑book purchase
description: How can I order and download an e‑book from the École de Guerre website, including which formats are offered, payment options, and expected delivery time?
narrative: The user seeks a complete guide to acquiring a War School e‑book: the steps to place an order, the available e‑book formats (epub, mobi, azw3), accepted payment methods (credit card via Société Générale, bank transfer), and the typical time frame for receiving the digital file or physical copy. Relevant content includes the sections describing e‑book downloads, order processing, payment security, and delivery timelines.

title: Reloadable Unemployment Benefits
description: What are the exact conditions and procedures for reloading my ARE unemployment benefits after returning to work in France?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive, up‑to‑date information on the eligibility criteria, required work periods (hours or days), timing constraints (lapse period, dates of reform), and the procedural steps (notification, proof of activity, right of option) for obtaining a reload of unemployment benefits (ARE) after re‑enrolment with Pôle Emploi. Relevant documents must explain the minimum work thresholds (e.g., 910 hours/130 days or earlier thresholds), the impact of the 2019‑2020 reforms, the role of the right of option, and how Pôle Emploi calculates and issues the reload. Only sources that describe these specific rules, examples, and the application process are considered relevant.

title: AXA Business Portal Access
description: How do I log into the AXA Business Salary Savings customer area and what services can I manage there?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed instructions to access the AXA Business Salary Savings client space, including login steps, password recovery, and security checks, as well as an overview of the functionalities available once logged in (e.g., managing salary savings, updating employee information, consulting reports, and conducting collective operations). Relevant documents are those that describe the AXA customer space, authentication procedures, and the specific features of the Business Salary Savings portal.

title: Electric Car Costs
description: What are the upfront price, purchase subsidies, and tax exemptions applicable to buying a midsize electric vehicle in France?
narrative: The user intends to determine the effective purchase price of a midsize EV in France, so relevant material must provide model price ranges, details of the green bonus, conversion and retrofit premiums, used‑car incentives, registration‑tax exemption, and any eligibility criteria such as price caps or income limits.

title: Bicarbonate Blight Remedy
description: What is the effectiveness and proper usage of sodium bicarbonate for controlling downy mildew and late blight on potato plants?
narrative: The user wants to know whether baking soda (sodium bicarbonate) can reliably prevent or treat downy mildew and late blight in potatoes, including recommended concentrations, application methods, timing, and any impact on plant health or food safety. Relevant documents should discuss the disease symptoms, existing control measures, the bicarbonate recipe (e.g., 1 tablespoon per litre of water), its properties (edible, non‑toxic), and any evidence or expert commentary on its efficacy.

title: Three Days Darkness
description: What are the origins, interpretations, and predicted timing of the “Three Days of Darkness” prophecy in New Age and religious sources?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information about the “Three Days of Darkness” prophecy, including its historical roots in various traditions (Christian, Hopi, Maya, etc.), how contemporary New Age figures like Monique Mathieu describe it, and any specific dates or astronomical explanations that have been proposed. Relevant documents should discuss the prophecy’s content, its claimed mechanisms (e.g., celestial events, pole shifts), and the context in which it is presented, while excluding unrelated conspiracy‑theory chatter that lacks reference to the three‑day motif.

title: French Spaceballs Streaming
description: Where can I watch the full French‑language version of La Folle Histoire de l'Espace (Spaceballs, 1987) online for free?
narrative: The user is looking for web pages that provide a complete, uninterrupted streaming or download of the French‑dubbed (VF) version of the 1987 Mel Brooks film "La Folle Histoire de l'Espace". Relevant results should include sites offering the full‑length movie (≈109 min) in French, preferably legal or at least publicly accessible without payment. Pages that only host trailers, excerpts, reviews, unrelated privacy policies, or non‑French versions are not relevant.

title: Season 6 Outlook
description: What is the current status and expected release details for a possible sixth season of Le Bureau des Légendes?
narrative: The user is looking for recent, authoritative information on whether a sixth season of the French espionage series will be produced, including any official announcements from Canal+, comments from the showrunner or cast, and the anticipated broadcast or streaming platform; relevant documents are those that discuss season‑6 speculation, actor interviews, and series continuation plans.

title: Prévaloir Meaning
description: What are the definitions, grammatical uses, and historical development of the French verb prévaloir and how does it compare to the English verb ‘to prevail’?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive overview of the French verb prévaloir, including its literal and figurative senses (e.g., ‘to dominate’, ‘to exist’, ‘to take advantage of’), its conjugation in the present and past tenses, and citations from classical French literature that illustrate each meaning. Relevant documents should provide etymology, frequency of usage across centuries, and distinctions from the English cognate ‘to prevail’. Only sources that discuss the verb’s semantics, grammatical patterns, and historical examples are considered relevant.

title: Remote Region Episodes
description: What are the remote locations visited by each celebrity on the French TV series “Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu”?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive list that pairs every episode’s celebrity guest with the specific remote area, indigenous community, or tribe they visited, including the year of the broadcast. Documents are relevant if they contain the celebrity name, the year, and the name of the location or people (e.g., Tsaatans, Dogons, Van Gujjars, etc.) that were featured in the episode.

title: Diarrhea Diet
description: What foods and drinks should be eaten or avoided to help recover from diarrhea?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive guide on dietary choices for managing diarrhea, including which vegetables, fruits, starches, proteins, fats, dairy products, and beverages are recommended or prohibited, as well as advice on portion size, preparation (cooked vs raw), and hydration. Relevant documents must contain specific food categories, preparation tips, and fluid recommendations that directly address how to alleviate diarrhea symptoms.

title: Paris Event Space
description: Where can I rent a large event venue in Paris, such as the Espace Charenton, and what are its capacity and contact details?
narrative: The user is seeking information about venues in Paris that are available for rent for events, with a focus on large spaces like Espace Charenton. Relevant documents should provide details on the venue’s size (e.g., 3000 m²), capacity (number of guests or events), typical usage (e.g., 300 events, 200 000 visitors), and contact information (phone number, website). Documents that mention other Parisian event spaces not matching these criteria are not relevant.

title: Green Supplier Comparison
description: How do E.Leclerc Energies, ekWateur, and Alpiq differ in pricing, renewable energy guarantees, and contract flexibility for residential electricity supply in France?
narrative: The user wants a side‑by‑side analysis of three French electricity providers that market green or low‑cost electricity. Relevant passages must describe each supplier's price structure (e.g., kWh at cost price plus subscription for E.Leclerc, per‑kWh rates and subscription fees for ekWateur, guaranteed cheaper-than‑regulated tariffs for Alpiq), the extent and proof of renewable energy (Guarantees of Origin for ekWateur, renewable share statements for Alpiq, alerts about renewable periods for E.Leclerc), and contract terms such as commitment length, ability to switch, subscription fees, and any special offers (mobile‑only plan, no‑commitment, off‑peak options). Documents that address these aspects are considered relevant; those that only mention generic company information without pricing, renewable or contract details are not.

title: Kia SUV Prices
description: Which Kia SUV models are offered with a starting MSRP below $30,000?
narrative: The user is looking for Kia sport‑utility vehicles that have a manufacturer’s suggested retail price (starting MSRP) under $30,000. Relevant documents should list each qualifying model, its quoted starting MSRP, and note that the price excludes destination, handling, taxes, and other fees. Information about model trims, optional packages, and any caveats about price variability should also be considered.

title: Gaul Ancestry Myth
description: What historical evidence supports or refutes the claim that modern French people are direct descendants of the ancient Gauls?
narrative: The user is looking for a scholarly assessment of the idea that the French population descends from the ancient Gauls, distinguishing myth‑making (e.g., 19th‑century school textbooks, nationalist narratives) from archaeological, linguistic, and classical sources. Relevant documents should discuss Caesar’s description of the peoples of Gaul, the later development of the Gaul‑French identity in historiography, and the role of other groups (e.g., Franks, Vikings, immigrants) in France’s ancestry. Material that merely mentions the Gauls without addressing the ancestry claim, or that focuses solely on myth without historical context, is not relevant.

title: Faro Cheap Car Rental
description: What are the cheapest, fully insured, free‑cancellation car rental options at Faro Airport for a 7‑day July trip?
narrative: The user wants to rent a compact or economy car for one week in July, picking up and returning the vehicle at Faro Airport. The rental must cost no more than €200 total, include comprehensive insurance (no extra deductible), allow free cancellation up to 24 hours before pick‑up, and have a user rating of at least 4 out of 5 stars. The user also wants to avoid hidden fees such as toll‑device charges or mandatory extra insurance, and prefers agencies that explicitly list air‑conditioning as standard equipment.

title: Nantes Car Rental
description: What car rental options, prices, and rental conditions are available at Nantes South Station for a traveler over 21 years old?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information about car‑rental services located at Nantes Gare Sud (South Station), including the types of vehicles offered (economy, compact, utility, trucks), average daily rates, age restrictions, fuel and cancellation policies, required documents, and contact details. Relevant passages are those that describe the ADA and Europcar agencies at Nantes South Station, their opening hours, vehicle categories, pricing, and rental terms. Information unrelated to Nantes South Station or to car‑rental services (e.g., unrelated locations, general travel tips, or non‑rental services) is not relevant.

title: Early Potato Varieties
description: Which potato varieties are suitable for early harvest in a small garden and offer good resistance to common diseases?
narrative: The user wants guidance on selecting cultivars that mature early, can be grown in a limited‑space plot, and are resistant to the main potato pathogens and pests (late blight, downy mildew, Colorado beetle, scab, etc.). Relevant material must describe early‑harvest varieties, their taste and yield traits, and any disease‑resistance features or companion‑plant recommendations that help protect the crop.

title: Beaujolais Wine Routes
description: What are the principal wine‑tourism routes and related attractions in the Beaujolais region, including vineyards, crus, festivals, and dining experiences?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive guide to exploring Beaujolais on foot or by car, focusing on the location of the major appellations (e.g., Morgon, Fleurie, Brouilly), the Beaujolais Nouveau celebration, tasting recommendations, and nearby cultural or culinary sites. Relevant material must describe the geography of the Beaujolais hills, the list of crus, the timing of the Nouveau event, and practical tips for visitors such as recommended restaurants, pairing suggestions, and preservation advice for tasting the wine on site.

title: Durable Winter Boots
description: Where can I find durable, comfortable men's winter boots comparable to Timberland's original 6‑inch boot, including style, price, and store availability?
narrative: The user is seeking information about men’s winter footwear that offers the same durability, comfort, and classic design as Timberland's iconic 6‑inch boot. Relevant documents should describe comparable boots or shoes from other brands (e.g., André, boat‑shoe retailers), detail materials and construction for cold weather, list price ranges or discounts, and provide purchase options such as online stores, physical shop locations, or delivery/return policies. Documents that include style comparisons, seasonal suitability, and availability in France or other regions satisfy the need.

title: Electric Van Options
description: Which electric vans are available from Renault (and comparable brands) with a purchase price up to €35,000, including key specifications, eco‑bonus incentives, and lease terms?
narrative: The user is looking for information on electric van models suitable for business use, focusing on Renault offerings such as the Kangoo Van E‑Tech and Master E‑Tech, as well as comparable electric vans from other manufacturers. Relevant results must provide the vehicle’s price (before or after eco‑bonus), technical specs (battery capacity, range, payload), and any leasing or long‑term rental options mentioned in the documents. Documents that only list diesel or non‑electric models, or that exceed the €35,000 price threshold, are not relevant.

title: Budget Car Rental Corfu
description: What is the cheapest car rental option in Corfu that includes free cancellation and unlimited mileage?
narrative: The user seeks the lowest‑priced rental vehicle on Corfu, ideally a Mini‑class car, and requires that the offer provide free cancellation and unlimited mileage; relevant documents must mention price, agency, car category, and these policy features.

title: Réunion Car Rental
description: What car rental agencies operate on Réunion Island and what services (airport delivery, unlimited mileage, insurance, child seats, pricing) do they offer?
narrative: The user is planning a trip to Réunion and wants to locate car‑rental providers on the island, especially those that can deliver the vehicle to the airport or a hotel, provide unlimited mileage, all‑risk insurance, free child‑seat or baby‑seat options, and transparent pricing. Relevant results should describe the agencies (e.g., My Car Loc, ADA, SG Services), their pick‑up/drop‑off locations, operating hours, vehicle categories, and any extra benefits such as free transfers, additional drivers, or 24‑hour support.

title: American Car Logos
description: What are the major American automobile brands and the history, symbolism, and visual details of their logos?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive overview of U.S. car manufacturers, emphasizing each brand’s current logo, its design elements (shapes, colors, symbols), and how the logo has evolved over time. Relevant passages should mention brands such as Chevrolet, Ford, Cadillac, Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep, Ram, Lincoln, Buick, GMC, Corvette, Tesla, and provide historical context, design rationale, and visual descriptions of the logos.

title: Mad Max Compensation
description: What compensation would a road‑accident victim like Max Rockatansky be entitled to under the French Badinter law?
narrative: The user wants to link the fictional road‑accident scenario in the film Mad Max (the police officer’s crash, injuries, and loss of child) with the real‑world French Badinter law on road‑accident compensation. Relevant material must describe the plot details of Mad Max that involve the crash and injuries, and also explain the Badinter law’s provisions, eligibility criteria, types of damages (bodily injury, aesthetic prejudice, loss of chance, etc.), and how compensation amounts are calculated. Documents that cover either the film’s accident narrative or the compensation framework are considered relevant.

title: Bordeaux Event Accessibility
description: What transportation and accessibility services are available for attending events at the Arkéa Arena in Bordeaux, including costs and contact information?
narrative: The user wants details on how to reach and access events at the Arkéa Arena, specifically looking for driver rental options, pricing, dedicated phone lines for reduced‑mobility and disabled attendees, and any related COVID‑19 measures. Relevant documents are those that mention a driver service (450 €/day), the arena’s accessibility phone line (05 56 48 26), and information about accommodations for people with disabilities or hearing impairments.

title: Menie Grégoire Letters
description: Where can I locate the letters sent by French women farmers to Menie Grégoire during 1969‑1976 in the Indre‑et‑Loire departmental archives?
narrative: The user seeks primary‑source correspondence from the Menie Grégoire fonds (collection 66 J) that contains letters written by rural women between 1969 and April 1976. Relevant results must identify items from this collection, provide metadata such as sender name, date, and thematic content about daily agricultural life, and indicate whether the material is digitized, catalogued online, or available for on‑site consultation at the Indre‑et‑Loire archives.

title: Energy Bill Challenge
description: What are the steps, deadlines, and contact procedures for a consumer to dispute an inaccurate electricity or gas bill in France?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive guide on contesting an energy invoice, including the statutory limitation periods for consumers and professionals, the hierarchical escalation path (customer service → consumer service → ombudsman), required documentation, and how mediation affects the deadline. Relevant documents must detail the applicable French codes (e.g., Article L.218-2, Article 2224), contact information for ENGIE and the National Energy Ombudsman, and the principles for a valid complaint.

title: Budget Graphic Tablet
description: What low‑cost graphic tablet provides the best drawing experience for amateur artists in terms of pen pressure sensitivity, screen quality, and software compatibility?
narrative: The user is looking for a recommendation of an affordable graphic tablet that balances price with performance for hobbyist sketching and drawing. Relevant documents should mention graphic tablets, their features (pen pressure levels, display resolution, screen size), pricing information, and suitability for amateurs. Sources that discuss comparative guides, product specifications, and user‑oriented buying advice for graphic tablets will satisfy the need.

title: Color Photography Origins
description: When and how was color photography first invented and what were the key processes and inventors involved?
narrative: The user is seeking a concise historical account of the emergence of color photography, focusing on the earliest experiments, the scientists and photographers who pioneered it, and the technical methods they used. Relevant documents should mention the timeline (mid‑19th century), the contributions of James Clerk Maxwell, Thomas Sutton, and Louis Ducos du Hauron, and describe the experimental procedures such as trichromy and the first color prints. Materials that provide dates, inventor names, and descriptions of the processes will be considered relevant, while later commercial color films or digital color imaging are outside the scope.

title: Healthy Leek Quiche
description: Which leek quiche recipes are vegetarian and low‑fat, and what ingredient substitutions can reduce saturated calories while preserving flavor?
narrative: The user is looking for leek quiche preparations that avoid meat (e.g., lardons) and use reduced‑fat dairy or plant‑based alternatives. Relevant documents must describe a complete recipe, list the specific low‑fat or vegetarian substitutions, and include enough detail (ingredients, quantities, cooking steps) for the user to evaluate nutritional suitability.

title: Game Scoring Policy
description: What are the rules and conditions for earning points in the recreational games on the educational software platform?
narrative: The user is looking for information that explains how the point system works for recreational games, including any restrictions (e.g., points not awarded during contests, differences between recreational and other game types, how points are counted for overall rankings, and any related FAQs or official guidelines). Relevant documents should detail the scoring criteria, mention periods when points are disabled, and clarify the relationship between game completion, contests, and point accumulation.

title: SAM Host Family
description: How can I obtain accommodation with a host family through the SAM network for a job interview that is far from my home?
narrative: The user wants step‑by‑step guidance on using the Solidarity, Reception, Mobility (SAM) network to stay with a host family when a recruitment interview requires traveling a significant distance and possibly arriving the night before. Relevant documents must explain the eligibility criteria (interview outside the home region, travel time forcing overnight stay), the role of the job‑centre advisor and SAM relay, the €10 contribution, and how to arrange the accommodation without needing a travel voucher.

title: SFR login assistance
description: How do I recover a forgotten SFR client‑area password and link my email to the account?
narrative: The user needs detailed, step‑by‑step instructions for accessing the SFR (or Prixtel) client area when the password is forgotten, including how to request a password reset via email, receive and enter the verification code, and subsequently link an email address to the account. Relevant pages are those that describe the password‑reset workflow, the email‑linking process, and any related login or invoice‑access procedures.

title: Oil Lamp Selection
description: What criteria should I use to choose the best oil lamp for outdoor use in 2021, and which models are ranked highest?
narrative: The user wants a concise guide that explains the key factors for selecting an oil lamp (e.g., fuel type, brightness, size, material durability, portability, and aesthetic style) and provides a short ranked list of the top-performing models for 2021. Relevant documents are those that describe selection criteria, compare features of popular lamps, list the 2021 top‑10 best oil lamps, and detail specifications of brands such as Gaudart, Cao Camping, Favorit, Feuerhand, and others. Documents that only sell accessories without discussing selection factors are not relevant.

title: Madeira Car Rental
description: What are the cheapest car‑rental services in Madeira that include full coverage insurance and free pick‑up/drop‑off?
narrative: The user is planning a trip to Madeira and wants to rent a vehicle. Relevant results must describe rental offers on the island that are low‑cost, provide all‑risk (full) insurance without additional deductible, and include free delivery or pick‑up at the airport or other locations (e.g., Funchal, hotel). The user also cares about transparent pricing (no hidden fees), the ability to choose vehicle type (manual, diesel, etc.), and positive customer feedback about reliability and service. Documents that mention cheap rates, inclusive insurance, free delivery to specific towns, and user testimonials about satisfaction are considered relevant.

title: New Potato Cooking
description: What are the recommended handling, storage, and cooking techniques (sauté, rissolée, oven‑roast, etc.) for early or “new” potatoes, and what recipes best showcase their delicate texture?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive guide on early (new) potatoes, focusing on how to keep them fresh, how to treat their thin skin, and the optimal ways to cook them while preserving their delicate texture. Relevant material should explain storage limits (e.g., refrigeration shortly after harvest), handling tips (gentle washing, avoiding skin removal until cooking), and address common cooking myths (peeling before boiling, cooling in water). It should describe specific methods such as sautéing in butter (rissolée), pan‑frying, and oven‑roasting, including heat levels, timing, and seasoning suggestions (e.g., fleur de sel, rosemary, olive oil, pomegranate accompaniment). At least one complete recipe with ingredients and step‑by‑step instructions for a new‑potato dish should be provided. Documents that cover any of these aspects – the characteristics of new potatoes, practical preparation steps, cooking techniques, and detailed recipes – are considered relevant.

title: Back-to-Work Bonus Eligibility
description: What are the current eligibility criteria and application steps for the French back‑to‑work bonus for RSA beneficiaries who have recently started a CDI?
narrative: The user is a recent RSA recipient who has obtained a permanent employment contract (CDI) and wants to know if they can claim the €1,000 return‑to‑work bonus. Relevant information includes required prior benefits (RSA, SSA, IPA), minimum work hours (e.g., 78 hours per month) and duration (at least four consecutive months), whether the bonus is still available after recent policy changes, and the documentation and procedures needed to apply. Documents describing the bonus’s conditions, examples of successful and unsuccessful claims, and notices of discontinuation are all pertinent.
